variants.title: HiFi Filter SD 70487 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 564
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SD 70487 Urea Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 564. Easy to install and replace, the SD 70487 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
